user_query: Looking at the Mother's breakfast proposals for Day 1.. which of these three is the fastest to prep? I'm going to be in a rush.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 1 > Breakfast > Egg Scramble — Garlic-Ginger Bake

node_data.name: Egg Scramble — Garlic-Ginger Bake
node_data.short_description: An egg scramble with spinach and tomatoes cooked in olive oil; a simple, protein-forward dish featuring vegetables.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Best as a quick breakfast or light lunch; pair with whole-grain toast or fruit for extra fiber and complex carbs.
node_data.nutrition_note: Protein-rich eggs provide essential amino acids and satiety; olive oil contributes heart-healthy fats; spinach and tomatoes add fiber, vitamins A, C, and K, and minerals—resulting in a balanced, quick breakfast.

selected_nodes.reasoning: The Egg Scramble is described as a 'simple' and 'quick' breakfast option.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 1 > Breakfast > Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl

node_data.name: Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl
node_data.short_description: Protein-packed cottage cheese bowl with pineapple and cinnamon for a tangy, tropical-inspired breakfast or snack.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Cottage cheese bowl topped with pineapple and a light dusting of cinnamon. Enjoy as a quick high-protein breakfast or snack. For more fiber and staying power, add berries, chia seeds, or a small handful of nuts.
node_data.nutrition_note: Protein-rich cottage cheese delivers satiety and calcium; pineapple contributes vitamin C and natural sweetness with modest sugars. Cinnamon adds aroma and may modestly aid blood sugar regulation.

selected_nodes.reasoning: The Cottage Cheese Bowl is explicitly described as a 'quick high-protein breakfast' and involves minimal preparation (topping cheese with fruit).

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 1 > Breakfast > Smoothie — Sesame Twist

node_data.name: Smoothie — Sesame Twist
node_data.short_description: Creamy banana oat smoothie with milk and peanut butter; protein- and fiber-rich, balanced and satisfying.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Great as a quick breakfast or post-workout drink. To honor the Sesame Twist, top with sesame seeds or swirl in a small amount of tahini; optionally add a pinch of cinnamon or vanilla for extra aroma.
node_data.nutrition_note: Balanced smoothie with carbohydrates from banana and oats, protein from milk and peanut butter, and healthy fats from peanut butter. Good source of calcium and potassium; can be calorie-dense, so adjust portions to fit your needs. For a Sesame Twist, consider topping with sesame seeds or swirling in a bit of tahini.

selected_nodes.reasoning: The Smoothie is described as 'Great as a quick breakfast,' which fits the user's need for speed.
